title: nicolaia elatior
intro: Nicolaia elatior, also known as the golden silk tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Connaraceae. Nicolaia elatior has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nicolaia elatior include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Nicolaia elatior can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
